name: Shrimp Fritters
recipeInstructions:
Green Chile Peppers should be rinsed and chopped. In a saucepan, cook onion and garlic in the 2 tablespoons of vegetable oil until the onion is tender. Stir in the undrained tomatoes, chile peppers, half teaspoon of salt, and pepper. Bring to boil and then reduce heat. Cover and simmer for 20 minutes and set aside, keeping it warm.
Meanwhile, beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form and set aside.
Beat the egg yolks and remaining quarter teaspoon of salt for about 5 minutes or until thick and lemon-colored. Fold in the reserved whites into the yokes. Sprinkle the flour on top of the mixture and fold in the shrimp. In a deep skillet or saucepan, heat one inch of vegetable oil to 365 degrees F.
Spoon the shrimp mixture into the hot oil using two tablespoons for small fritters or one-fourth cup for large fritters. Fry about two minutes on each side or until golden brown. Drain on paper towels. Serve hot with the tomato sauce.
